maintenance_tasks.name: General Visual Inspection
maintenance_tasks.description: Walkaround visual inspection for leaks, damage, missing parts.

maintenance_tasks.name: Lubrication
maintenance_tasks.description: Lubricate specified points per manufacturer schedule.

maintenance_tasks.name: Change Oil & Filter
maintenance_tasks.description: Change engine oil and replace oil filter.

maintenance_tasks.name: Inspect Brakes
maintenance_tasks.description: Inspect brakes for wear, adjustment, and function.

maintenance_tasks.name: Inspect Tires
maintenance_tasks.description: Inspect tires for tread, damage, pressure, and wear pattern.

maintenance_tasks.name: Inspect Lights
maintenance_tasks.description: Verify all lights and reflectors operate and are intact.

maintenance_tasks.name: Inspect Hydraulics
maintenance_tasks.description: Inspect hoses, cylinders, fittings for leaks/damage.

maintenance_tasks.name: Inspect Electrical
maintenance_tasks.description: Inspect wiring, connectors, breakers for condition.

maintenance_tasks.name: Verify Safety Devices
maintenance_tasks.description: Verify guards, interlocks, e-stops, alarms function.

maintenance_tasks.name: Calibration Verification
maintenance_tasks.description: Perform verification check per calibration procedure.
